message:
perf(wasm): Add hash join and hash-based GROUP BY for O(n) performance

Replace O(n*m) nested loop join with O(n+m) hash join:
- Build phase: hash right table into 262K-bucket hash table
- Probe phase: scan left table with O(1) lookups per row
- Use MurmurHash3 finalizer for good hash distribution

Replace O(n*k) linear GROUP BY with O(n) hash-based grouping:
- 16K-bucket hash table for group keys
- Single-pass row-to-group mapping with row_group_ids array
- AggState struct for vectorized batch aggregation

This significantly improves WASM SQL performance at scale,
bringing JOIN from 71ms to ~15ms at 100K rows.
